docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $725.00 FILED BY WARNER, GEORGIANA S. AS TO DEFENDANT ANUZZIE CONCRETE SERVICES,INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-29-2005 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
